rule_metadata.name: Havex_NetScan_Malware
rule_metadata.description: This rule will search for known indicators of a Havex Network Scan module infection. This module looks for hosts listening on known ICS-related ports to identify OPC or ICS systems and the file created when the scanning data is written.
rule_metadata.author: M4r14ch1

rules.rule_text:
rule Havex_NetScan_Malware
{
	meta:
		description = "This rule will search for known indicators of a Havex Network Scan module infection. This module looks for hosts listening on known ICS-related ports to identify OPC or ICS systems and the file created when the scanning data is written."
		author = "M4r14ch1"
		reference = "https://github.com/M4r14ch1/Havex-Network-Scanner-Modules"
		date = "2015/12/21"

	strings:
		$s0 = "~tracedscn.yls" wide nocase
		$s1 = { 2B E2 ?? }
		$s2 = { 30 71 ?? }

	condition:
		$s0 and ( $s1 or $s2 )
}
